title: Light Malty Portuguese Apricots Pasta
description: A light, malty, and festive Portuguese dish featuring dried apricots and a pasta-water emulsion. Perfect for a flexitarian dinner.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the spaghetti according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat and add the chopped apricots, cinnamon, and cloves. Cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the brown sugar to the skillet and stir to combine. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the mixture is caramelized.
In a small bowl, whisk together the water and heavy cream. Add to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked spaghetti to the skillet, tossing to combine with the apricot and cream mixture.
Season with kosher salt to taste and serve topped with grated parmesan and chopped parsley.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
